name: python3-mypy-extensions
title: python3-mypy-extensions
summary: Experimental type system extensions for mypy typechecker (Python 3)
description:
Experimental type system extensions for mypy typechecker (Python 3)
Add type annotations to your Python programs, and use mypy to type check them.
Mypy is essentially a Python linter on steroids, and it can catch many
programming errors by analyzing your program, without actually having to run
it. Mypy has a powerful type system with features such as type inference,
gradual typing, generics and union types.
.
The "mypy_extensions" module defines experimental extensions to the
standard "typing" module that are supported by the mypy typechecker.
.
This package provides the modules for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mypy-extensions because Experimental type system extensions for mypy typechecker (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mypy-extensions as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mypy-extensions with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mypy-extensions --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
